economic_notes: Proportionately consolidated Ocean Destiny Joint Venture (50%) and Kitasoo/Gitga'at Forestry Joint Venture (50%). Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Investments in Great Bear Carbon Credit Limited Partnership (6%), North Co-Corp Ferry Services Ltd. (33%), Coastal Nations Fisheries LP (7%), BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($8,037,766) + Province of BC ($3,551,464) + FNHA ($1,281,543) + DFO ($820,222) = $13,691,995. OSR includes Other revenue, Own source revenue, Rental income, Interest and investment income, Administration fees, and Earnings from investments. No long-term debt reported on balance sheet. Fishing licences carried as intangible asset at $2,770,000. Restricted cash of $2,294,532 restricted by BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP agreement. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Gitga'at Development Corporation, Gitga'at Land Holdings Ltd., Gitga'at Forestry Inc. Inventory for resale of $612,415 appeared for first time in 2023.
